mapper.insert: insert into kh_drug (drug_id, name_english, name_chinese, name_general_temp, name_brand_temp, is_zhongyao, category_id, is_general, general_drug_id, source_url, spider_job_id, check_status, id_action_webmd) values (#{drugId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{nameEnglish,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nameChinese,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nameGeneralTemp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nameBrandTemp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isZhongyao,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{categoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{isGeneral,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{generalDrugId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{sourceUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{spiderJobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{checkStatus,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{idActionWebmd,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update kh_drug set name_english = #{nameEnglish,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name_chinese = #{nameChinese,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name_general_temp = #{nameGeneralTemp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name_brand_temp = #{nameBrandTemp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_zhongyao = #{isZhongyao,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, category_id = #{categoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, is_general = #{isGeneral,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, general_drug_id = #{generalDrugId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, source_url = #{sourceUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, spider_job_id = #{spiderJobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, check_status = #{checkStatus,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, id_action_webmd = #{idActionWebmd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where drug_id = #{drugId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select drug_id, name_english, name_chinese, name_general_temp, name_brand_temp, is_zhongyao, category_id, is_general, general_drug_id, source_url, spider_job_id, check_status, create_time, update_time, id_action_webmd from kh_drug limit 1

select drug_id, name_english, name_chinese, name_general_temp, name_brand_temp, is_zhongyao, category_id, is_general, general_drug_id, source_url, spider_job_id, check_status, create_time, update_time, id_action_webmd from kh_drug where drug_id = #{drugId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select drug_id, name_english, name_chinese, name_general_temp, name_brand_temp, is_zhongyao, category_id, is_general, general_drug_id, source_url, spider_job_id, check_status, create_time, update_time, id_action_webmd from kh_drug where drug_id in
#{item}
